creator: adsouza@math.uwaterloo.ca
text:
the configure script in the port looks for a version of qt <=2.2.2 when it should probably look for one >=2.2.2 since the libs ought to compile with 2.2.4, which is what the kde team reccomends using.

How-To-Repeat: make clean for kdelibs2 after installing qt2.2.4
